titleZh: 上市公司重大资产重组管理办法（2025年修订）
titleEn: Administrative Measures for Major Asset Reorganizations of Listed Companies
shortTitle: 重大资产重组管理办法
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 上市公司并购重组的核心部门规章。2025年修订引入分期支付股份对价、重组简易审核程序，并根据新公司法对条文表述作了适配调整。
summaryEn: The core CSRC departmental rule for listed-company M&A and major asset reorganizations. The 2025 revision introduced staged share consideration, a simplified review track, and new-Company-Law alignment updates.

sources.label: Official English (reference)
sources.noteZh: 证监会英文站公开的是该办法早期英文版，可作为现行 2025 年修订规则的官方英文参考。
sources.noteEn: The CSRC English site hosts an earlier official English version of these measures, used here as an official English reference for the current 2025 revision.
